property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-17\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\oraclexe\app\oracle\product\10.2.0\server\bin;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Server 8.0\bin;C:\Program Files\MongoDB\mongosh-2.3.3-win32-x64\bin;C:\Windows\System32;C:\ProgramData\chocolatey\bin;C:\Program Files\nodejs\;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-17\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Users\rajes\Downloads\apache-maven-3.9.15-bin\apache-maven-3.9.15\bin;C:\Users\rajes\Downloads\apache-maven-3.9.15-bin\apache-maven-3.9.15\bin;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21.0.11\bin;;C:\Program Files\Docker\Docker\resources\bin;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Shell 8.0\bin\;C:\Users\rajes\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Launcher\;C:\Users\rajes\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\rajes\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Users\rajes\AppData\Roaming\npm;C:\Users\rajes\AppData\Local\Programs\cursor\resources\app\bin;.

testcase.name: runScenario["Verify account overview page after login", "Account Overview Functionality"](1)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Verify account overview page after login # src/test/resources/features/AccountOverview.feature:3 âœ” Given User launches ParaBank application # stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.user_launches_parabank_application() âœ” When user logs into ParaBank application # stepdefinitions.AccountsSteps.user_logs_into_para_bank_application() âœ” And user clicks on accounts overview # stepdefinitions.AccountsSteps.user_clicks_on_accounts_overview() âœ” Then user should navigate to accounts overview page # stepdefinitions.AccountsSteps.user_should_navigate_to_accounts_overview_page()
testcase.system-err: SLF4J(W): No SLF4J providers were found. SLF4J(W): Defaulting to no-operation (NOP) logger implementation SLF4J(W): See https://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#noProviders for further details.

testcase.name: runScenario["Verify account details and balances are displayed", "Account Overview Functionality"](2)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Verify account details and balances are displayed # src/test/resources/features/AccountOverview.feature:11 âœ” Given User launches ParaBank application # stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.user_launches_parabank_application() âœ” When user logs into ParaBank application # stepdefinitions.AccountsSteps.user_logs_into_para_bank_application() âœ” And user clicks on accounts overview # stepdefinitions.AccountsSteps.user_clicks_on_accounts_overview() âœ” Then user should see account details and balances # stepdefinitions.AccountsSteps.user_should_see_account_details_and_balances()

testcase.name: runScenario["Navigate to bill pay page", "Bill Pay Functionality"](3)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Navigate to bill pay page # src/test/resources/features/BillPay.feature:4 âœ” Given User launches ParaBank application # stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.user_launches_parabank_application() âœ” When user logs into parabank for bill payment # stepdefinitions.BillPaySteps.user_logs_into_parabank_for_bill_payment() âœ” And user clicks on bill pay link # stepdefinitions.BillPaySteps.user_clicks_on_bill_pay_link() âœ” Then user should navigate to bill pay page # stepdefinitions.BillPaySteps.user_should_navigate_to_bill_pay_page()

testcase.name: runScenario["Pay bill using valid details", "Bill Pay Functionality"](4)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Pay bill using valid details # src/test/resources/features/BillPay.feature:11 âœ” Given User launches ParaBank application # stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.user_launches_parabank_application() âœ” When user logs into parabank for bill payment # stepdefinitions.BillPaySteps.user_logs_into_parabank_for_bill_payment() âœ” And user clicks on bill pay link # stepdefinitions.BillPaySteps.user_clicks_on_bill_pay_link() âœ” And user enters valid bill payment details # stepdefinitions.BillPaySteps.user_enters_valid_bill_payment_details() âœ” And user clicks send payment button # stepdefinitions.BillPaySteps.user_clicks_send_payment_button() âœ” Then bill payment should be successful # stepdefinitions.BillPaySteps.bill_payment_should_be_successful()

testcase.name: runScenario["Pay bill using invalid details", "Bill Pay Functionality"](5)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Pay bill using invalid details # src/test/resources/features/BillPay.feature:20 âœ” Given User launches ParaBank application # stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.user_launches_parabank_application() âœ” When user logs into parabank for bill payment # stepdefinitions.BillPaySteps.user_logs_into_parabank_for_bill_payment() âœ” And user clicks on bill pay link # stepdefinitions.BillPaySteps.user_clicks_on_bill_pay_link() âœ” And user enters invalid bill payment details # stepdefinitions.BillPaySteps.user_enters_invalid_bill_payment_details() âœ” And user clicks send payment button # stepdefinitions.BillPaySteps.user_clicks_send_payment_button() âœ” Then user should see invalid bill payment behavior # stepdefinitions.BillPaySteps.user_should_see_invalid_bill_payment_behavior()

testcase.name: runScenario["Verify bill payment confirmation message", "Bill Pay Functionality"](6)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Verify bill payment confirmation message # src/test/resources/features/BillPay.feature:29 âœ” Given User launches ParaBank application # stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.user_launches_parabank_application() âœ” When user logs into parabank for bill payment # stepdefinitions.BillPaySteps.user_logs_into_parabank_for_bill_payment() âœ” And user clicks on bill pay link # stepdefinitions.BillPaySteps.user_clicks_on_bill_pay_link() âœ” And user enters valid bill payment details # stepdefinitions.BillPaySteps.user_enters_valid_bill_payment_details() âœ” And user clicks send payment button # stepdefinitions.BillPaySteps.user_clicks_send_payment_button() âœ” Then user should see bill payment confirmation message # stepdefinitions.BillPaySteps.user_should_see_bill_payment_confirmation_message()

testcase.name: runScenario["Login with valid username and password", "Login Functionality"](7)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Login with valid username and password # src/test/resources/features/Login.feature:3 âœ” Given User launches ParaBank application # stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.user_launches_parabank_application() âœ” When User enters valid username and password # stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.user_enters_valid_username_and_password() âœ” And User clicks login button # stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.user_clicks_login_button() âœ” Then User should navigate to account overview page # stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.user_should_navigate_to_account_overview_page()

testcase.name: runScenario["Login with invalid username", "Login Functionality"](8)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Login with invalid username # src/test/resources/features/Login.feature:10 âœ” Given User launches ParaBank application # stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.user_launches_parabank_application() âœ” When User enters invalid username and valid password # stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.user_enters_invalid_username_and_valid_password() âœ” And User clicks login button # stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.user_clicks_login_button() âœ” Then User should see invalid login error message # stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.user_should_see_invalid_login_error_message()

testcase.name: runScenario["Login with invalid password", "Login Functionality"](9)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Login with invalid password # src/test/resources/features/Login.feature:17 âœ” Given User launches ParaBank application # stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.user_launches_parabank_application() âœ” When User enters valid username and invalid password # stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.user_enters_valid_username_and_invalid_password() âœ” And User clicks login button # stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.user_clicks_login_button() âœ” Then User should see invalid login error message # stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.user_should_see_invalid_login_error_message()

testcase.name: runScenario["Login with blank credentials", "Login Functionality"](10)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Login with blank credentials # src/test/resources/features/Login.feature:24 âœ” Given User launches ParaBank application # stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.user_launches_parabank_application() âœ” When User enters blank username and password # stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.user_enters_blank_username_and_password() âœ” And User clicks login button # stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.user_clicks_login_button() âœ” Then User should see invalid login error message # stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.user_should_see_invalid_login_error_message()

testcase.name: runScenario["Verify all UI elements on login page", "Login Functionality"](11)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Verify all UI elements on login page # src/test/resources/features/Login.feature:31 âœ” Given User launches ParaBank application # stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.user_launches_parabank_application() âœ” Then User should verify username textbox # stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.user_should_verify_username_textbox() âœ” And User should verify password textbox # stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.user_should_verify_password_textbox() âœ” And User should verify login button # stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.user_should_verify_login_button()

testcase.name: runScenario["Verify error message for invalid login", "Login Functionality"](12)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Verify error message for invalid login # src/test/resources/features/Login.feature:38 âœ” Given User launches ParaBank application # stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.user_launches_parabank_application() âœ” When User enters invalid username and password # stepdefinitions.LogoutSteps.user_enters_invalid_username_and_password() âœ” And User clicks login button # stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.user_clicks_login_button() âœ” Then User should see invalid login error message # stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.user_should_see_invalid_login_error_message()

testcase.name: runScenario["Verify logout functionality", "Logout Functionality"](13)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Verify logout functionality # src/test/resources/features/Logout.feature:3 âœ” Given User launches ParaBank application # stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.user_launches_parabank_application() âœ” When user logs into parabank for logout # stepdefinitions.LogoutSteps.user_logs_into_parabank_for_logout() âœ” And user clicks logout link # stepdefinitions.LogoutSteps.user_clicks_logout_link() âœ” Then user should logout successfully # stepdefinitions.LogoutSteps.user_should_logout_successfully()

testcase.name: runScenario["Verify session termination after logout", "Logout Functionality"](14)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Verify session termination after logout # src/test/resources/features/Logout.feature:10 âœ” Given User launches ParaBank application # stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.user_launches_parabank_application() âœ” When user logs into parabank for logout # stepdefinitions.LogoutSteps.user_logs_into_parabank_for_logout() âœ” And user clicks logout link # stepdefinitions.LogoutSteps.user_clicks_logout_link() âœ” Then user session should terminate successfully # stepdefinitions.LogoutSteps.user_session_should_terminate_successfully()

testcase.name: runScenario["Navigate to user registration page", "Registration Functionality"](15)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Navigate to user registration page # src/test/resources/features/Registration.feature:3 âœ” Given User launches ParaBank application # stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.user_launches_parabank_application() âœ” When user clicks on register link # stepdefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_clicks_on_register_link()

testcase.name: runScenario["Register new user with valid details", "Registration Functionality"](16)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Register new user with valid details # src/test/resources/features/Registration.feature:8 âœ” Given User launches ParaBank application # stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.user_launches_parabank_application() âœ” When user clicks on register link # stepdefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_clicks_on_register_link() âœ” And user enters firstname # stepdefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_enters_firstname() âœ” And user enters lastname # stepdefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_enters_lastname() âœ” And user enters address # stepdefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_enters_address() âœ” And user enters city # stepdefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_enters_city() âœ” And user enters state # stepdefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_enters_state() âœ” And user enters zipcode # stepdefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_enters_zipcode() âœ” And user enters phone number # stepdefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_enters_phone_number() âœ” And user enters ssn # stepdefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_enters_ssn() âœ” And user enters username # stepdefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_enters_username() âœ” And user enters password # stepdefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_enters_password() âœ” And user enters confirm password # stepdefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_enters_confirm_password() âœ” And user clicks register button # stepdefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_clicks_register_button() âœ” Then user should register successfully # stepdefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_should_register_successfully()

testcase.name: runScenario["Register user with missing mandatory fields", "Registration Functionality"](17)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Register user with missing mandatory fields # src/test/resources/features/Registration.feature:26 âœ” Given User launches ParaBank application # stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.user_launches_parabank_application() âœ” When user clicks on register link # stepdefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_clicks_on_register_link() âœ” And user clicks register button without entering mandatory fields # stepdefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_clicks_register_button_without_entering_mandatory_fields() âœ” Then user should see mandatory field error # stepdefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_should_see_mandatory_field_error()

testcase.name: runScenario["Verify successful registration message", "Registration Functionality"](18)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Verify successful registration message # src/test/resources/features/Registration.feature:33 âœ” Given User launches ParaBank application # stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.user_launches_parabank_application() âœ” When user clicks on register link # stepdefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_clicks_on_register_link() âœ” And user enters firstname # stepdefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_enters_firstname() âœ” And user enters lastname # stepdefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_enters_lastname() âœ” And user enters address # stepdefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_enters_address() âœ” And user enters city # stepdefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_enters_city() âœ” And user enters state # stepdefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_enters_state() âœ” And user enters zipcode # stepdefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_enters_zipcode() âœ” And user enters phone number # stepdefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_enters_phone_number() âœ” And user enters ssn # stepdefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_enters_ssn() âœ” And user enters username # stepdefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_enters_username() âœ” And user enters password # stepdefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_enters_password() âœ” And user enters confirm password # stepdefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_enters_confirm_password() âœ” And user clicks register button # stepdefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_clicks_register_button() âœ” Then user should register successfully # stepdefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_should_register_successfully()

testcase.name: runScenario["Navigate to transfer funds page", "Transfer Funds Functionality"](19)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Navigate to transfer funds page # src/test/resources/features/TransferFunds.feature:3 âœ” Given User launches ParaBank application # stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.user_launches_parabank_application() âœ” When user logs into parabank for transfer funds # stepdefinitions.TransferFundsSteps.user_logs_into_parabank_for_transfer_funds() âœ” And user clicks on transfer funds link # stepdefinitions.TransferFundsSteps.user_clicks_on_transfer_funds_link() âœ” Then user should navigate to transfer funds page # stepdefinitions.TransferFundsSteps.user_should_navigate_to_transfer_funds_page()

testcase.name: runScenario["Transfer funds between accounts with valid data", "Transfer Funds Functionality"](20)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Transfer funds between accounts with valid data # src/test/resources/features/TransferFunds.feature:10 âœ” Given User launches ParaBank application # stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.user_launches_parabank_application() âœ” When user logs into parabank for transfer funds # stepdefinitions.TransferFundsSteps.user_logs_into_parabank_for_transfer_funds() âœ” And user clicks on transfer funds link # stepdefinitions.TransferFundsSteps.user_clicks_on_transfer_funds_link() âœ” And user enters valid transfer amount # stepdefinitions.TransferFundsSteps.user_enters_valid_transfer_amount() âœ” And user clicks transfer funds button # stepdefinitions.TransferFundsSteps.user_clicks_transfer_funds_button() âœ” Then fund transfer should be successful # stepdefinitions.TransferFundsSteps.fund_transfer_should_be_successful()

testcase.name: runScenario["Transfer funds with invalid amount", "Transfer Funds Functionality"](21)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Transfer funds with invalid amount # src/test/resources/features/TransferFunds.feature:20 âœ” Given User launches ParaBank application # stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.user_launches_parabank_application() âœ” When user logs into parabank for transfer funds # stepdefinitions.TransferFundsSteps.user_logs_into_parabank_for_transfer_funds() âœ” And user clicks on transfer funds link # stepdefinitions.TransferFundsSteps.user_clicks_on_transfer_funds_link() âœ” And user enters invalid transfer amount # stepdefinitions.TransferFundsSteps.user_enters_invalid_transfer_amount() âœ” And user clicks transfer funds button # stepdefinitions.TransferFundsSteps.user_clicks_transfer_funds_button() âœ” Then user should see invalid transfer behavior # stepdefinitions.TransferFundsSteps.user_should_see_invalid_transfer_behavior()

testcase.name: runScenario["Verify success message after fund transfer", "Transfer Funds Functionality"](22)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Verify success message after fund transfer # src/test/resources/features/TransferFunds.feature:30 âœ” Given User launches ParaBank application # stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.user_launches_parabank_application() âœ” When user logs into parabank for transfer funds # stepdefinitions.TransferFundsSteps.user_logs_into_parabank_for_transfer_funds() âœ” And user clicks on transfer funds link # stepdefinitions.TransferFundsSteps.user_clicks_on_transfer_funds_link() âœ” And user enters valid transfer amount # stepdefinitions.TransferFundsSteps.user_enters_valid_transfer_amount() âœ” And user clicks transfer funds button # stepdefinitions.TransferFundsSteps.user_clicks_transfer_funds_button() âœ” Then user should see transfer success message # stepdefinitions.TransferFundsSteps.user_should_see_transfer_success_message()

testcase.name: runScenario["Navigate to update contact information page", "Update Contact Information Functionality"](23)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Navigate to update contact information page # src/test/resources/features/UpdateContactInfo.feature:3 âœ” Given User launches ParaBank application # stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.user_launches_parabank_application() âœ” When user logs into parabank for update contact info # stepdefinitions.UpdateContactInfoSteps.user_logs_into_parabank_for_update_contact_info() âœ” And user clicks on update contact info link # stepdefinitions.UpdateContactInfoSteps.user_clicks_on_update_contact_info_link() âœ” Then user should navigate to update contact info page # stepdefinitions.UpdateContactInfoSteps.user_should_navigate_to_update_contact_info_page()

testcase.name: runScenario["Update contact details with valid data", "Update Contact Information Functionality"](24)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Update contact details with valid data # src/test/resources/features/UpdateContactInfo.feature:11 âœ” Given User launches ParaBank application # stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.user_launches_parabank_application() âœ” When user logs into parabank for update contact info # stepdefinitions.UpdateContactInfoSteps.user_logs_into_parabank_for_update_contact_info() âœ” And user clicks on update contact info link # stepdefinitions.UpdateContactInfoSteps.user_clicks_on_update_contact_info_link() âœ” And user enters valid contact details # stepdefinitions.UpdateContactInfoSteps.user_enters_valid_contact_details() âœ” And user clicks update profile button # stepdefinitions.UpdateContactInfoSteps.user_clicks_update_profile_button() âœ” Then contact details should update successfully # stepdefinitions.UpdateContactInfoSteps.contact_details_should_update_successfully()

testcase.name: runScenario["Update contact details with invalid data", "Update Contact Information Functionality"](25)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Update contact details with invalid data # src/test/resources/features/UpdateContactInfo.feature:20 âœ” Given User launches ParaBank application # stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.user_launches_parabank_application() âœ” When user logs into parabank for update contact info # stepdefinitions.UpdateContactInfoSteps.user_logs_into_parabank_for_update_contact_info() âœ” And user clicks on update contact info link # stepdefinitions.UpdateContactInfoSteps.user_clicks_on_update_contact_info_link() âœ” And user enters invalid contact details # stepdefinitions.UpdateContactInfoSteps.user_enters_invalid_contact_details() âœ” And user clicks update profile button # stepdefinitions.UpdateContactInfoSteps.user_clicks_update_profile_button() âœ” Then user should see invalid update behavior # stepdefinitions.UpdateContactInfoSteps.user_should_see_invalid_update_behavior()

testcase.name: runScenario["Verify updated contact information", "Update Contact Information Functionality"](26)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Verify updated contact information # src/test/resources/features/UpdateContactInfo.feature:29 âœ” Given User launches ParaBank application # stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.user_launches_parabank_application() âœ” When user logs into parabank for update contact info # stepdefinitions.UpdateContactInfoSteps.user_logs_into_parabank_for_update_contact_info() âœ” And user clicks on update contact info link # stepdefinitions.UpdateContactInfoSteps.user_clicks_on_update_contact_info_link() âœ” And user enters valid contact details # stepdefinitions.UpdateContactInfoSteps.user_enters_valid_contact_details() âœ” And user clicks update profile button # stepdefinitions.UpdateContactInfoSteps.user_clicks_update_profile_button() âœ” Then user should see updated contact information message # stepdefinitions.UpdateContactInfoSteps.user_should_see_updated_contact_information_message()
